description: Repairs of Violations Notice Case Number: 23-04208-MPM: Clean up sanitation, remove weeds and plant growth, clean up defacement of property, paint wood surfaces to protect them as required, identification numbers on premises, repairs ot foundation walls as required.

The building as existing is an open area on the ground floor with 3 residential units above. This permit only applies to the commercial space on the first floor. The project will divide the open space up into separate offices for private use by different businesses with shared amenities like bathrooms, a kitchen, etc.
Repair to exterior plywood siding, Repair to interior attic joists (less than 50 linear feet), repair to interior drywall (less than 100 sq ft).

THE SCOPE OF WORK INCLUDES THE DEMOLITION AND NEW CONSTRUCTION FOR BALCONIES, EXTERIOR DOORS, WINDOWS AND ALL ASSOCIATED WORK FOR UNITS 209, 210, 309, 310, 409 AND 410. ADDITIONALLY, THE EXTERIOR BRICK WORK ON THE SOUTH SIDE OF THE BUILDING EXTENDING BETWEEN THE TWO FIRE WALLS WILL BE REMOVED AND REPLACED. THE PARAPET WILL BE REPLACED. EXISTING DOWNSPOUTS & SCUPPER HEADS TO BE REMOVED AND REINSTALLED.

description: The Project consists of constructing a 27,000 sq. ft. Community Center in Uptown New Orleans. The Community Center will feature two auditoriums, classrooms, offices, a commercial grade kitchen, and a playground. The Community Center shall serve as a fully operational and licensed childcare center for up to 75 children; a DHH licensed feeding center for the undeserved; and provide classrooms for skilled apprenticeships, after school tutoring, activities for the elderly and other public functions.
